member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ChatController.GetMyCode
member.summary: Returns the current user's unique chat code (first 6 chars of userId, uppercase).

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ChatController.GetUserByCode(System.String)
member.summary: Find a user by their 6-char unique chat code.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ChatController.GetOnlineCount
member.summary: Returns count of currently active sessions (online users).

member.name: P:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Models.EncryptedPrivateMessage.Content
member.summary: Plain text content (used when E2E is not set up).

member.name: P:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Models.EncryptedPrivateMessage.Ciphertext
member.summary: Base64 encoded AES-GCM ciphertext (optional, for E2E encrypted DMs).

member.name: T:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Models.PatchRequestPayload
member.summary: Payload type passed by the File Transformation Plugin to registered callback methods. Must strictly match the deserialization layout so Jellyfin doesn't crash during intercept.

member.name: T:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.ScriptInjectionMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that injects the latestmedia.js script into any index.html response served by Jellyfin. Uses the same approach as jellyfin-plugin-ratings. No external dependencies or file system write access required.

member.name: T:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.ScriptInjectionStartupFilter
member.summary: Startup filter that registers the ScriptInjectionMiddleware into the ASP.NET Core pipeline at application startup. Pattern from K3ntas/jellyfin-plugin-ratings.
